name: standards-refresh.sh without --gate keeps the default auto-write behavior — official namespace written, no _project staging dir created
command:
OUT=/tmp/cl564-r22-$$; mkdir -p $OUT/out && cat > $OUT/s.html <<'HTML'

Doc

Rule one

prose one.

HTML cat > $OUT/reg.yaml <e.err; [ -f $OUT/out/european-union/r22-src.yaml ] && [ ! -d $OUT/out/_project ] && grep -q 'WROTE sid=r22-src' e.err && echo ungated-default-auto-write-unchanged 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
